Subject: new business — a client of ours

Morning! Hope you're keeping well. I've got a client I'd love to get in front of you — they're
a fintech, run a lending product for small businesses, and hold a fair old pile of customer
data (north of a million records on the books now). No bother with claims that I'm aware of,
clean as a whistle. They were thinking a two million pound limit would see them right, and their
company number is SC123456 if that helps you look them up.

Let me know what you can do!

Cheers, Dan
